rulings.Case Title: N.R. PATEL VS. CRYSTAL JONES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion To Vacate Defualt And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 27, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT CRYSTAL JONES' Motion To Vacate Defualt And Default Judgment GRANTED subject to (1) defendant presenting a courtesy copy of filed Proof of Service for the Motion to Vacate; (2) opposition; (3) Defendant posting $3,225 with the Court no later than January 27, 2015 by 4:00 p.m.; and (4) Defendant filing answer no later than January 27, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/REQ)
